episode_metadata.audio_source: assets/audio/track_Corporate satire lo-fi hip hop, melancho_20260328_160454.mp3
episode_metadata.aesthetic_base: cinematic lighting, tilt-shift photography, 1990s stop-motion style, highly detailed felt and wood texture

storyboard_sequence.visual_prompt: A worn felt puppet staring at a flickering CRT monitor in a dim cubicle, extreme close-up, dust motes in the air
storyboard_sequence.action: 木偶呆滯凝視螢幕，眼神空洞，手指無意識地敲打桌面

storyboard_sequence.visual_prompt: Close-up on wooden puppet hands clutching a ceramic coffee mug, tilt-shift macro, cold desk surface
storyboard_sequence.action: 手緩緩握緊馬克杯，蒸氣在昏黃燈光下飄散

storyboard_sequence.visual_prompt: Overhead shot of cluttered felt desk with sticky notes, rubber stamps and stacked folders, 1990s office still life
storyboard_sequence.action: 靜物鏡：便利貼隨空調微風輕輕顫動

storyboard_sequence.visual_prompt: Low-angle shot of an analog wall clock, second hand twitching back and forth, fabric-textured wall background
storyboard_sequence.action: 時鐘秒針卡頓、後退、再前進，象徵時間無盡輪迴

storyboard_sequence.visual_prompt: Wide shot of empty office hallway at night, single fluorescent tube flickering, puppet silhouette in distance
storyboard_sequence.action: 走廊盡頭木偶身影緩緩走近，腳步聲規律如機器
